name_cn:
5ND022 Black Burgundy White Nude
Revitalizing the signature Matelassé pattern, this practical clutch features a drawstring closure, exquisite finish, and a metal logo.
Matelassé craftsmanship, leather drawstring closure, cotton satin lining, metal-engraved logo.
Size: 16*7.5*14cm
